response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Lyrics successfully retrieved and matched for 'Watch me!' and 'High-Touch☆Memory'. 2. subtitles.english: ...but look!

subtitles.english: I like this kind of Day by day

subtitles.english: Because it won't change, always Only you

subtitles.english: So look, this is no time to be dilly-dallying!

subtitles.original: 掴めハッピーエンディング
subtitles.english: Grab that happy ending!

subtitles.original: いつまでも 隣で笑っていたいのよ
subtitles.english: I want to keep laughing by your side forever

subtitles.original: いつも仲間はずれで とぼとぼの毎日
subtitles.english: Always left out, plodding through each day,

subtitles.original: そんな私の前に 現れた君は
subtitles.english: When you appeared before me,

subtitles.original: 同じ寂しさを 抱えている
subtitles.english: Carrying the same loneliness as me,

subtitles.original: とても とても 優しい人
subtitles.english: You are a very, very kind person.

subtitles.original: 今も心配事は多いけど
subtitles.english: Even though there are still many worries,

subtitles.original: もう私も君も 一人じゃない
subtitles.english: Neither you nor I are alone anymore.

subtitles.original: 騒がしくて愛おしいこの日々が ずっと続きますように
subtitles.english: I hope these noisy, precious days will continue forever

subtitles.original: 飛ばせ happyなイメージ
subtitles.english: Send out a happy image!

subtitles.original: とびきりの fancyなマジック
subtitles.english: With an extraordinary, fancy magic!

subtitles.original: また君に くどくど言われそうだけど
subtitles.english: I bet you'll nag at me again, but...

subtitles.original: そんな Day by day がいい

subtitles.english: Since that day, Falling in love with you

subtitles.original: 気づいて欲しいの Loving you
subtitles.english: I want you to notice, Loving you

subtitles.original: だからここ うだうだしてる場合じゃないの
subtitles.english: So look, this is no time to be dilly-dallying!

subtitles.original: 次はどんなプランニング
subtitles.english: What's the next plan?

subtitles.original: そしてまた 今日もハプニング
subtitles.english: And there's another happening today

subtitles.original: 明日はどんな
subtitles.english: What kind of...

subtitles.original: おかしなことが起こるかな
subtitles.english: strange things will happen tomorrow?

subtitles.original: ずっと隣で見ててね
subtitles.english: Watch over me by my side forever

subtitles.english: A happy image!

subtitles.english: A happy image!

subtitles.english: Fancy magic!

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ☆メモリー (LIVE High-Touch☆Summer ver.)
subtitles.english: [Song: High-Touch☆Memory (LIVE High-Touch☆Summer ver.)]

subtitles.original: いっせーのでキミとだけ！
subtitles.english: On three, let's do it, just you and me!

subtitles.original: もう少し眠りたいけど
subtitles.english: I want to sleep a little more, but...

subtitles.original: もったいないよ 今日はサンデー
subtitles.english: That's such a waste, today is Sunday!

subtitles.original: 楽しいこと やりたいこと wake up! 始めようよ
subtitles.english: Fun things, things I want to do, wake up! Let's get started!

subtitles.original: めくりめく季節 キミと 次のステージへ
subtitles.english: In this dazzling season with you, onto the next stage!

subtitles.original: 声を合わせて 扉開けて 駆けだせ 迷わずに
subtitles.english: Raise our voices, open the door, and run out without hesitation!

subtitles.original: 転んでも カッコ悪くても いいじゃない
subtitles.english: Even if we fall or look uncool, isn't it fine?

subtitles.original: stand up! イメージもっと 重ねていく その先で
subtitles.english: Stand up! Let's build up our images even more, beyond that...

subtitles.original: いっせーのでキミとだけ
subtitles.english: On three, just you and me,

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ 手叩いて
subtitles.english: high-five, clapping hands!

subtitles.original: 奏でる メロディーを
subtitles.english: With the melody we play...

subtitles.original: 合図に走りだせ
subtitles.english: as our cue, let's start running!

subtitles.original: キミとなら 怖くない
subtitles.english: With you, I'm not afraid.

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ 手と手叩いて
subtitles.english: High-five, hand against hand!

subtitles.original: 重ねる そのメモリーは
subtitles.english: These memories we pile up...

subtitles.original: 明日への エネルギー
subtitles.english: are our energy for tomorrow!

subtitles.original: さぁいこうよ もっと先へ
subtitles.english: Come on, let's go even further!

subtitles.original: キミとなら Happy Lucky Life!
subtitles.english: With you, it's a Happy Lucky Life!

subtitles.original: あの日見た夢の続き 追いつくその日まで
subtitles.english: The continuation of the dream we saw that day, until the day we catch up...

subtitles.original: 涙なんて 振り切るくらい もっと speed up!
subtitles.english: Shake off those tears, speed up even more!

subtitles.original: どんな未来になったとしても 後悔しないよ
subtitles.english: No matter what kind of future lies ahead, I won't regret a thing!

subtitles.original: 自分自身 選んだ道 踏み出せ 迷わずに
subtitles.english: Step forward on the path you chose yourself, without hesitation!

subtitles.original: 落ち込んで 進めなくなったときは
subtitles.english: When you're feeling down and can't move forward,

subtitles.original: wake up! 思い返す 夢見た頃の記憶を
subtitles.english: Wake up! Remember the memories of when we dreamed...

subtitles.original: 手と手で奏でる(叶える) 響きを(きらめく夢を) キミとだけ
subtitles.english: Let's play and fulfill it hand-in-hand, a resounding sparkling dream, only with you!

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ その度に
subtitles.english: High-five, and each time we do...

subtitles.original: 繋がっていく心
subtitles.english: our hearts connect even more

subtitles.original: 一人じゃないことを 気づかせてくれたよね...
subtitles.english: You made me realize that I am not alone, didn't you?

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ 手と手叩いて
subtitles.english: High-five, hand against hand!

subtitles.original: 奏でるそのメロディーが
subtitles.english: The melody we play...

subtitles.original: 世界に届くまで
subtitles.english: until it reaches the entire world...

subtitles.original: この夢は続いていく
subtitles.english: this dream will go on!

subtitles.original: キミとなら Happy Lucky Live!
subtitles.english: With you, it's a Happy Lucky Live!

subtitles.original: くじけて歩けない日は
subtitles.english: On days you're too discouraged to walk,

subtitles.original: おんぶしてあげるキミを
subtitles.english: I'll carry you on my back!

subtitles.original: ほら見て そっちのほうが
subtitles.english: Look over there, that way...

subtitles.original: 強気自慢 踏み込める
subtitles.english: we can take a step forward with pride!
